hero.title: Maramureș Belvedere
hero.subtitle: A boutique mountain retreat where tradition meets timeless comfort

ourRooms.title: Our Rooms
ourRooms.subtitle: Each room is designed to blend rustic Maramureș charm with modern comfort.

ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.p1: Nestled in the rolling hills of Maramureș — one of Europe's last truly unspoiled regions — Belvedere was born from a love for this land and its timeless traditions. Our guesthouse stands where shepherds once watched over their flocks, offering uninterrupted views of forested mountains and quiet valleys.
ourStory.p2: Every detail, from the hand-carved wooden balconies to the locally sourced breakfast, reflects the soul of Maramureș. Whether you come for the hiking, the UNESCO wooden churches, or simply to slow down, you'll leave feeling deeply renewed.

explore.title: Explore Maramureș
explore.hikingDesc: Explore pristine mountain paths through ancient forests and alpine meadows.
explore.forestDesc: Gentle walks through centuries-old beech and fir forests.
explore.churchesDesc: Visit UNESCO-listed traditional wooden churches unique to Maramureș.
explore.traditionsDesc: Experience authentic village life, crafts, and traditional Romanian cuisine.
